headline: Nvidia Quietly Builds Major AI Portfolio Shaping Investor Risk And Optionality
summary: Nvidia (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has built one of Silicon Valley's largest private AI investment portfolios under CEO Jensen Huang. The company nearly doubled its private company holdings over the past year, according to its latest quarterly disclosure. Nvidia deployed record capital into emerging AI and technology ventures, including nearly US$18b into private ventures in a single quarter. As of 26 April, Nvidia reported more than US$42b in private company holdings linked to the broader AI...
